# Sprint 0.1 Environment Setup

**Sprint:** Sprint 0. Platform Foundation
**Objective:** Establish a solid foundation for the data engineering project by setting up the development environment and defining the project scope.

## Description
Set up the development environment, including installing necessary tools and software, and configuring the project repository. Ensure all team members have access to the necessary resources.

## Deliverable
Fully configured development environment
